productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex Black Digital Watch
description: Style Note Check out Q& Q's latest collection of watches for kids. Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Now let your little one flaunt his/her timely bling with panache.   Product Details Case style: Digital watch with a black plastic square case  Strap style: Black plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Day, date, alarm, stopwatch displayed on the dial and four screws to reset time and other multiple features Water resistant Warranty: 1 year Size Case diameter: 25 mm  Case thickness: 5 mm
